title: Hodge Weight Filtration Identification v2

analysis.object: T519: Hodge Weight Filtration Identification v2 depth analysis

weight_k.description: Pure weight k in Hodge structure = EML depth k/2
weight_k.reason: Weight filtration is the EML depth hierarchy in classical algebraic geometry

mixed_hodge.description: Mixed Hodge structures span multiple EML depths; extensions are EML-inf
mixed_hodge.reason: Extension classes in mixed Hodge are EML-inf categorification data

bijection_forced.description: Weight filtration identification forces shadow bijection for pure weight
bijection_forced.reason: If weight=depth then Hodge classes at depth k/2 must shadow algebraic at EML-0

analysis.theorem: T519: Hodge Weight Filtration Identification v2 (S798).
